config_content:
# Base config for object detection (Transformers backend)
# Experiments modify this file; training scripts are stable infrastructure.

task_type: detect
backend: transformers

# Model
model_name_or_path: ustc-community/dfine-small-coco

# Dataset (must be on HF Hub)
dataset_name: cppe-5
train_split: train
eval_split: test

# Training
num_train_epochs: 20
per_device_train_batch_size: 8
per_device_eval_batch_size: 8
learning_rate: 5.0e-5
weight_decay: 0.01
warmup_steps: 0.1
lr_scheduler_type: cosine
gradient_accumulation_steps: 1
fp16: true
dataloader_num_workers: 4
do_train: true
do_eval: true

# Augmentation
image_square_size: 640
use_albumentations: true

# Backbone
freeze_backbone: false

# Evaluation
eval_strategy: epoch
save_strategy: epoch
load_best_model_at_end: true
metric_for_best_model: eval_mAP
greater_is_better: true

# Promotion (submit_patch ledger / local master)
promotion:
  primary: mAP
  direction: higher
  min_delta: 0.0

# Hub
push_to_hub: false
